subject: Swift-BAT trigger 152038 is definitely not a GRB
body:
S. Barthelmy (GSFC), J. Cummings (GSFC/NRC), C. Markwardt (GSFC/UMD)
on behalf of the Swift-BAT team:

Using the full BAT data from the recent telemetry downlink,
the Swift-BAT trigger 152038 (at 17:43:37 UT on 25 August 2005)
is not due to a GRB.  This was a cascade shower event from a
high energy cosmic ray in the spacecraft.
